response:
produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, representing the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna.  
produce the result of the integral, which is $ \int_{0}^{10} (4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7) dx = \left[ x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + 7x \right]_0^{10} = 10000 + 1000 + 100 + 70 = 11170 $.  
produce the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna is 11170 units.

produce the Fourier series representation of $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $ up to the second harmonic, assuming $ Q(t) $ is periodic with period $ 2\pi $.  
produce the Fourier series is $ 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, which is already a single harmonic.  
produce the Fourier series representation of $ Q(t) $ up to the second harmonic is $ 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $.
